landing.title: Brex: The Modern Finance Software Platform | Spend Smarter
landing.text:
Brex: The Modern Finance Software Platform | Spend Smarter
May early access is here! See what's new in Brex →
Products
Solutions
Resources
Customers
Pricing
Sign in
See a demo
Get started
Get started
Finance built for speed and control.
Modern cards, banking, expenses, accounting, and more — in 120+ countries.
Get started
See Brex in action
Finance built for speed and control.
Modern cards, banking, expenses, accounting, and more — in 120+ countries.
Get started
See Brex in action
Trusted by 35,000+ top companies.
The card is just the start.
Everything you need to boost spending power and control — and eliminate manual work.
Corporate cards
Spend smart globally with powerful cards and built-in controls.
Expense management
Use AI to automate approvals and expense reports. Track in real time.
Travel
Simplify global travel with in-app booking and management.
Bill pay
Save time with AI-powered invoice entry and payment automation.
Banking and treasury
Save, spend, and grow your cash with up to 3.64%† — from day one.
Solutions for every stage of growth.
Startups
Get the only complete financial stack designed to help start and scale your business.
Learn more
Mid-size companies
Spend smarter worldwide with AI-powered budgets, expenses, payments, and travel.
Learn more
Enterprises
Simplify global travel and expenses with automation that makes compliance easy.
Learn more
Supercharge your financial operations.
Maximize every resource with AI-powered controls, payments, and accounting.
Control spend before it happens.
Set budgets and allocate spend limits with auto-enforced controls that empower employees to spend wisely. Track and adjust in real time to keep everyone on budget and maximize impact.
Explore Brex cards
Make doing your expenses easy.
Make expenses a breeze for employees and managers with automated receipts, an AI-powered expense assistant, in-app travel bookings and itinerary changes. All in a five-star mobile app.
Explore Brex expense management
Maximize your spending power.
Unlock up to 3.64%†, fast global payments, up to 30x higher credit limits, and cash back with a Brex business account. Plus, safeguard your capital with up to $6M in additional FDIC insurance through our program banks.
Explore Brex business accounts
Pay vendors faster and easier.
Save time with AI-powered automation of invoice entry, approval, and payments. Issue vendor-specific cards for any teams with per-transaction limits and procurement approval flows.
Explore Brex bill pay
Accelerate accounting with AI.
Save time with AI-generated suggestions and 1,000s of two-way ERP integrations. Book accruals for incomplete expenses with one click to close the books every day and automate GL coding by entity globally.
Explore Brex accounting automation
Save and earn more, only with Brex.
AI-powered automation
4,250 hours
Average time saved per year with Brex’s expense and accounting automation.
Best-in-class treasury
Up to 3.64%†
Same-hour liquidity and built-in treasury that helps you make money.
Superior policy compliance
99%
Average rate of expense policy compliance by employees on Brex.
These metrics are based on internal metrics from December 2024. Past performance does not guarantee future results, which may vary.
DoorDash
SeatGeek
Lemonade
“Brex has been a major gain for us in efficiency for T&E. It’s easy for employees to understand where and how to spend.”
—
Mike Kim
, Vice President of Finance, DoorDash
Read the case study

SeatGeek
Lemonade
See what Brex can do for you.
Learn how our intelligent finance platform can help your company spend smarter and move faster.
Get started
See what Brex can do for you.
Learn how our intelligent finance platform can help your company spend smarter and move faster.
Get started
Trending insights on intelligent finance.
What is intelligent finance? 8 reasons to switch to AI-powered financial operations
Intelligent finance uses AI to eliminate manual expense reports, reviews, and policy enforcement. Learn how it automates finance, boosts compliance, and more.
Reimagining global cards and travel management for the enterprise
The CEOs of Brex and Navan discuss how their partnership unlocks 100% travel payment reconciliation for enterprise companies.
The future of procurement is automated and integrated
How modern companies approach procurement as part of a unified spend management system.
Why finance leaders are embracing AI-powered spend management
Some firms are using AI to increase control and ward off problems in finance and accounting. Are you?
AI, automation, and the future of accounting
Will AI replace my accountants? Probably not, says this CFO, but look for accounting roles to become more specialized as AI and automation go into hyperdrive.
Brex Benchmark: Spring 2026’s top 25 fastest-growing software vendors
Check out this spring's leaderboard based on momentum, scaling velocity, and dollar growth acceleration. Plus, two trends to watch as we head into summer.
How we built an AI oncall engineer at Brex
We encoded our oncall playbook into an agent. Here's what happened.
When your infrastructure tool's best interface is a web page, you have an agent problem
We built a terminal UI to replace a browser tab. Then we realized we'd built something agents could use too.
Building autonomous agents for technical tasks: 5 lessons learned
Brex built a general-purpose template for delegating engineering work to agents with confidence. Here's how we did it and what we learned.

, and is effective as of 05/26/26. Additional return is effective as of 05/26/26 and paid by Brex Treasury LLC, a Capital One company. here

(all unaffiliated institutions), pursuant to licenses by Mastercard International Inc. Mastercard is a registered trademark, and the circles design is a trademark of Mastercard International Inc. The Brex Commercial Card is issued by Sutton Bank (an unaffiliated institution), pursuant to a license from Visa® U.S.A. Inc. Can be used where Visa® cards are accepted. No ATM access. All loans are subject to approval, including underwriting, credit, and collateral approval, as well as availability restrictions. Nothing herein should be construed as a commitment to lend.
Certain payment services are provided by Brex Payments LLC, a
licensed money transmitter
(NMLS #2035354) and a Capital One company.
Some Brex products have associated fees. Plans start at $0 per user, per month, and more advanced features are available for $12 per user, per month.

docs.title: Overview
docs.text:
Overview
Skip to content
API
Guides
Examples
No-Code Options
Support
Changelog
Search
⌘K
Login
Overview
APIs
Accounting
Budgets & Limits
Expenses
Fields
Onboarding
Payments
Team
Transactions
Travel
Webhooks
Brex MCP
No-Code Options
Community Supported Libraries
Support
Overview
Copy
Copy for LLM
Copy page as Markdown for LLMs
View as Markdown
Open this page as Markdown
Open in ChatGPT
Get insights from ChatGPT
Open in Claude
Get insights from Claude
Brex
is the first fully unified spend platform — with global corporate cards, expense management, reimbursements, travel, and bill pay. Brex makes it easy for finance teams to control all of their spend, all in one place. Using the Brex API, you can power your internal tools and create custom workflows.
Brex APIs use the
REST
architecture, are defined using the
OpenAPI specification
and use standard HTTP response codes and verbs. All APIs accept and return JSON and require HTTPS.
Explore our guides and review our API documentation to see how you can integrate with Brex.
Accounting API
: View and manage accounting data
Budgets API
: Manage budgets and budget programs
Expenses API
: View and manage card expenses data, receipt match and receipt uploads
Fields API
: View and manage fields and their options
Onboarding API
: Refer your customers and personal contacts to Brex and prefill signup information
Payments API
: Manage vendors and send ACH, domestic wires, and checks
Team API
: Manage users, locations, departments, and cards
Transactions API
: View your transactions, accounts, and statements
Travel API
: View trips made in Brex Travel
Webhooks API
: Send real-time notifications based on events
Quickstart
Check out our
quickstart guide
to get up and running making your first Brex API call in just a few minutes. The rest of the guides and documentation provide more in-depth context.
API Status
Go to
https://status.brex.com
to see API and Brex system status.
Join us on Slack
Have feedback, questions, or ideas?
Join our Slack community
to discuss your API integrations with Brex employees and other developers.
Was this helpful?
Next page
Accounting
Copyright © Brex LLC 2019–2026. All rights reserved.
Ask AI

analysis.name: Brex
analysis.tagline: Finance built for speed and control.
analysis.value_proposition: All-in-one corporate finance platform combining global cards, banking, expense management, travel, and bill pay with AI automation across 120+ countries.
analysis.ideal_customer: Finance teams at growth-stage startups and mid-market to enterprise companies managing global spend, T&E, and accounting workflows

features.name: corporate cards
features.description: Unlimited global cards accepted in 210+ countries and territories with built-in spend controls
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited global cards, accepted in 210+ countries and territories

features.name: local-currency cards
features.description: Local-currency physical and virtual cards available in 50+ countries
features.evidence_quote: Local-currency cards and billing in 50+ countries

features.name: card rewards / cash back
features.description: Competitive cash back rewards on card spend
features.evidence_quote: Competitive card rewards

features.name: ai-powered custom rules
features.description: AI-generated spend rules and policy enforcement applied automatically to card transactions
features.evidence_quote: AI-powered custom rules

features.name: expense management
features.description: End-to-end expense tracking, submission, approval, and reporting for employees and managers
features.evidence_quote: Use AI to automate approvals and expense reports. Track in real time.

features.name: automated receipts
features.description: Automatic receipt capture and matching to card transactions
features.evidence_quote: Make expenses a breeze for employees and managers with automated receipts

features.name: ai expense assistant
features.description: AI-powered assistant to help employees complete and submit expense reports
features.evidence_quote: an AI-powered expense assistant, in-app travel bookings and itinerary changes

features.name: expense policy enforcement
features.description: Auto-enforced spend policies with 99% average compliance rate across employees
features.evidence_quote: 99% Average rate of expense policy compliance by employees on Brex.

features.name: multiple expense policies
features.description: Multiple customizable expense policies with category rules, role-based exceptions, and auto-approval rules
features.evidence_quote: Multiple, customizable expense policies (category rules, role-based policy exceptions, and auto-approval rules)

features.name: dynamic expense review chains
features.description: Configurable multi-step approval chains for expense review routing
features.evidence_quote: Dynamic expense review chains

features.name: ai compliance audit detection
features.description: AI-powered detection of policy violations and compliance insights for finance teams
features.evidence_quote: AI-powered compliance audit detection and insights

features.name: dynamic spend limit approval chains
features.description: Advanced approval workflows triggered dynamically by spend limit thresholds
features.evidence_quote: Advanced approvals with dynamic Spend Limit approval chains

features.name: spend limits
features.description: Configurable per-card and per-employee spend limits with real-time auto-enforcement
features.evidence_quote: Set budgets and allocate spend limits with auto-enforced controls

features.name: live budgets
features.description: Real-time budget tracking and adjustment across teams and departments
features.evidence_quote: Live budgets

features.name: real-time reporting

features.evidence_quote: Real-time reporting

features.description: Out-of-pocket employee expense reimbursement processing
features.evidence_quote: Reimbursements

features.evidence_quote: in-app travel bookings and itinerary changes

features.evidence_quote: Group travel and advanced travel rules

features.evidence_quote: Save time with AI-powered invoice entry and payment automation.

features.description: AI-powered automatic data extraction from invoices
features.evidence_quote: Save time with AI-powered automation of invoice entry, approval, and payments.

features.evidence_quote: Get business banking. Modern checking, vault, and a treasury that earns up to 3.64%

differentiators: First fully unified spend platform — global corporate cards, expense management, reimbursements, travel, and bill pay in one product
Up to 3.64% yield on treasury with same-hour liquidity
Up to 30x higher credit limits vs traditional corporate cards
Up to $6M FDIC insurance through program banks
4,250 hours average time saved per year from expense and accounting automation
Available in 120+ countries with local-currency cards in 50+ countries
Brex MCP for AI agent integration with spend data
Same-hour liquidity on treasury yield — earn interest while keeping funds accessible

recent_ships.what: May early access release with new features (details not available — changelog page returned 404)
recent_ships.source: May early access is here! See what's new in Brex →

praised: "Brex has been a major gain for us in efficiency for T&E. It's easy for employees to understand where and how to spend." — Mike Kim, VP Finance, DoorDash
Engineering community interest in Brex's AI/agent tooling (540 upvotes on HN for Brex Prompt Engineering Guide)
complaints: Customer eligibility/qualification concerns — HN thread 'Why am I no longer qualified to be a Brex customer?' drew 345 upvotes and 300 comments, suggesting perceived exclusivity or abrupt offboarding

free_tier.limits: 1 global entity (up to 2 entities total); basic accounting integrations; no advanced policies, live budgets, or multi-entity

tiers.name: Essentials
tiers.headline_inclusions: Global cards, AI rules, 2 entities, bill pay, reimbursements, travel booking, API access, basic accounting

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.headline_inclusions: Multi-entity US/intl, custom ERP/HRIS, advanced policies, live budgets, VAT docs, group travel

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited entities, local card issuance, admin center, named account manager, custom implementation

tiers.name: Smart Card
tiers.headline_inclusions: Global + local-currency cards in 50+ countries, merchant controls, custom approvals — procurement focused SKU

pricing.notes: Smart Card is a standalone procurement-focused SKU at custom pricing, separate from the main plan ladder. Brex LLC is a wholly owned subsidiary of Capital One N.A. (acquired for $5.15B per HN). Essentials is genuinely $0/user with no stated seat minimum.
